skill.name: maxhub-lemon8
skill.description: Lemon8/Lemon8平台生活方式图文与种草数据采集API Skill。提供16个API接口，支持数据采集、互动查询和搜索功能。
skill.summary: 采集Lemon8平台的生活方式内容和种草数据
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate Lemon8 social media data collection API wrapper. Static findings for external_commands and system_reconnaissance are FALSE POSITIVES - the scanner misidentified template syntax placeholders and API documentation as shell commands. Environment variable access (MAXHUB_API_KEY, MAXHUB_BASE_URL) is clearly documented and intentional for API authentication. Network access is limited to the MaxHub API service endpoints only. High entropy warnings are FALSE POSITIVES caused by Chinese text characters which naturally have higher byte entropy than ASCII text.

low_findings.title: Static Scanner Misidentified Template Syntax
low_findings.description: The static scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' patterns at lines using ${VAR} syntax. These are NOT shell commands - they are environment variable placeholders for API configuration (MAXHUB_BASE_URL, MAXHUB_API_KEY). The skill uses standard template variable substitution, not shell execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The ${VAR} syntax appears exclusively in API URL templates and configuration examples, not in any executable shell commands. The skill uses these placeholders to document how users should configure their API keys and endpoint URLs.

low_findings.title: Chinese Text Characters Misidentified as Encrypted Content
low_findings.description: The static scanner flagged 'High entropy string' warnings due to Chinese characters in the skill documentation. Chinese characters have naturally higher byte entropy (3-4 bytes per character in UTF-8) than ASCII text. This is normal for multilingual content, not evidence of obfuscation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The skill contains Chinese-English bilingual documentation. High entropy detection is a known false positive for non-ASCII character sets. No actual encrypted or obfuscated payloads were found.

low_findings.title: API Documentation Misidentified as System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: The static scanner flagged 'System reconnaissance' at API catalog lines. These are simply documentation listing the available API endpoints and their parameters - standard API documentation practice, not reconnaissance commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged lines contain only API endpoint documentation (GET/POST paths and parameter names). This is standard OpenAPI/Swagger-style documentation format, not system commands or reconnaissance patterns.

content.user_title: Collect Lemon8 Lifestyle Content and Engagement Data
content.value_statement: This skill enables AI assistants to query Lemon8 social media platform data through the MaxHub API. Use it to fetch user profiles, post details, comments, followers, search results, and trending topics for content analysis and market research.
actual_capabilities: Fetch Lemon8 user profiles including follower counts and bio information
Retrieve detailed post content including likes, comments, and engagement metrics
Search content by keyword, user, or topic with pagination support
Fetch discover page banners, trending topics, and hot search keywords
Get user follower and following lists for influencer analysis
Batch extract IDs from share links for multi-post analysis
limitations: Requires a MaxHub API key and account balance for API calls
Only accesses public data - cannot retrieve private account information
Rate limited to 60 requests per minute by default
Maximum 5 pages per query to prevent excessive API usage

use_cases.title: Market Research Analyst
use_cases.description: Research trending topics and popular content creators in specific niches to identify market trends and partnership opportunities.

use_cases.title: Content Creator
use_cases.description: Analyze competitor performance, track hashtag popularity, and gather inspiration from top-performing lifestyle content.
use_cases.target_user: Social media content creators and influencers

use_cases.title: Data Journalist
use_cases.description: Gather publicly available social media data for trend reporting and investigative stories about viral content.
use_cases.target_user: Journalists and researchers studying social media trends

prompt_templates.title: Search for Trending Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for the most popular Lemon8 posts about [TOPIC] today
prompt_templates.scenario: Use this when you want to find top-performing content in a specific category

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Creator Profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the profile information and recent posts for this Lemon8 user: [USER_ID or SHARE_LINK]
prompt_templates.scenario: Use this to analyze a specific content creator's performance

prompt_templates.title: Track Hashtag Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the top posts under the #LEMON8 hashtag for the topic [TOPIC]? Include engagement metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use this to track hashtag performance and viral content

prompt_templates.title: Batch Content Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze engagement data for these 5 Lemon8 posts: [SHARE_LINK_1], [SHARE_LINK_2], [SHARE_LINK_3]. Compare their performance metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use this to compare multiple pieces of content side by side

output_examples.input: Search for top fitness content on Lemon8
output_examples.output:
Top 10 fitness posts on Lemon8 today:
1. @fitlife_sarah - 45.2K likes, 3.2K comments
2. @homeworkouts_daily - 38.7K likes, 2.8K comments
3. @yoga_with_maya - 32.1K likes, 4.1K comments

Top trending hashtags: #fitnessjourney, #homeworkout, #yogalife

Creator Profile Analysis:
- Username: @beauty_tips_emma
- Followers: 125,000
- Following: 842
- Engagement rate: 8.4% (above average)
- Top categories: Skincare, Makeup tutorials, Product reviews
- Most liked post: 'Morning routine skincare steps' (67K likes)

best_practices: Always configure your MAXHUB_API_KEY before making requests to ensure proper authentication
Use pagination parameters to fetch data incrementally rather than requesting large datasets at once
Check your account balance before running batch queries to avoid unexpected charges
anti_patterns: Do not make repeated API calls in rapid succession without implementing rate limiting - this may trigger API blocks
Avoid requesting the same data repeatedly - cache results locally when possible
Do not share your API key in prompts or output - keep it as an environment variable only

faq.question: How do I get started with this skill?
faq.answer: Register at aconfig.cn, create an API key, and set MAXHUB_API_KEY in your environment. Then you can start querying Lemon8 data immediately.

faq.question: What data can I access with this skill?
faq.answer: You can access public posts, user profiles, comments, follower counts, trending topics, and search results. Private account data is not accessible.

faq.question: Is there a limit on how many requests I can make?
faq.answer: Yes, by default the rate limit is 60 requests per minute. The skill also caps single queries at 5 pages to control usage and costs.

faq.question: Does this skill work with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. It can be integrated into your AI assistant workflow.

faq.question: Can I analyze competitor accounts with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you can analyze any public Lemon8 account by their user ID or share link. You will get profile data, posts, and engagement metrics.

faq.question: What happens if my API credits run out?
faq.answer: The skill will return an error. You need to check your balance regularly and top up your MaxHub account to continue using the API.
